text:
Goran (ゴラン, Goran) was a Chimera Ant Squadron Leader killed by the Extermination Team. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 205 

Personality

Not much is known about Goran's personality, however, he was said to have gotten especially cocky since learning Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 20, Chapter 204 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

As Baital scours the smokey forest, he tries to get in contact with Goran, but to no avail. So Baital orders his own unit to rendezvous with Goran's. It is implied that Goran had already been killed by Isaac Netero at that time. 

Abilities & Powers

Being a Squadron Leader, Goran is physically stronger than any average human or, presumably, Chimera Ant soldier. According to his hierarchical position, he has authority over 4-5 Officers and several dozen Peon soldiers. 

Enhanced Durability:His body is considerably durable, since a punch from a Nen-using Rammot Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 198  did not incapacitate him.

Nen

After being violently "initiated", Goran learned Nen or at least became able to perceive aura (like Morel's transmuted smog).
